notableEvents.label: Henry Bolte GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Henry Bolte grounds into a double play, pitcher Robbie Ray to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Joey Meneses out at 2nd. Henry Bolte out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Colby Thomas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Jeff McNeil batting, Max Muncy picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Colby Thomas to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Athletics challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Drew Gilbert hit by pitch. Jung Hoo Lee to 3rd. Willy Adames to 2nd.
